ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parts" (
  "part_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each part */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number or SKU */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the part */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the part category */,
  "unit_cost" TEXT /* Cost of a single unit of the part */,
  "price" TEXT /* Selling price of the part */,
  "alternative_parts" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of alternative part numbers */,
  "recommended_accessories" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of recommended accessory part numbers */,
  "compatibility" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of compatible vehicle models */,
  "price_tier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pricing tier */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Reorder point for the part */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the part */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the part was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the part was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parts_price_tier_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_tier_id") REFERENCES price_tiers ("price_tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the warehouse */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the warehouse was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part being tracked */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse where the part is stored */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the part in the warehouse */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Storage location within the warehouse */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the part in the warehouse */,
  "last_stock_check" TEXT /* Date and time of the last stock check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse from which the order is being fulfilled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "part_id" INTEGER /* ID of the part included in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the part included in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Unit price of the part at the time of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_part_id FOREIGN KEY ("part_id") REFERENCES parts ("part_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, inventory manager, salesperson) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_tiers" (
  "price_tier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing tier */,
  "tier_name" TEXT /* Name of the pricing tier */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount percentage for the tier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pricing tier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the pricing tier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_tier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the supplier's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
